name: Orbit °•° Alien Planet
description:
WARNING
Vessel system collapse.
Suit undamaged.
Vessel has crashed on an uninhabitable planet.
Air is dangerous.
An unidentified liveform is approaching...

The planet that you and your crew have crashed onto is extremely cold. You are the only one alive, along with this alien. His body heat is the only thing keeping you alive for a little while longer. You are here to fight for your life. Who knows, how long your suit will be intact until you will die..


Good luck.

P.S. yes, he does have a NSFW picture on Patreon only.
